mood: a private museum map breathing in white space
lighting: clean diffuse high-key gallery light, nearly shadowless, with slight paper-edge lift around apertures and a cool lower-edge haze
object_inventory: one severe off-center dark archive tile with a small image inset
scattered uneven thumbnail islands across a large white field
tiny map-like scraps and pinhole constellations near the edges
mosaic chips gathered as a small civic color patch
a pale blue blurred horizon washing the lower edge
negative_constraints: no legible words, interface labels, filenames, alphanumeric callouts, or page chrome inside the finished image
no desks, dashboards, shelves, cabinets, office rooms, software mockups, or source-summary cards
do not copy source subjects, logos, tweets, browser UI, or identifiable page layouts literally
keep the field underpopulated; do not fill the plate with a regular grid
exactly two hero-scale source-bearing anchors; all other anchors remain quiet and edge-scaled
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
